overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene showing a character sitting on a rocky outcrop overlooking a vast grassland valley with distant mountains. The camera remains static in a third-person perspective as the character observes the landscape, occasionally shifting position while birds fly overhead in the clear midday sky.

events.description: character shifts sitting position and raises arm briefly while observing the landscape

agents.ego_description: sitting on the edge of a rocky outcrop overlooking the valley, remaining mostly still with occasional minor posture adjustments

entered.detail: large gray rock formation occupying the foreground where the character is seated
hazy blue mountain silhouette spanning the horizon under the clouds
dense clusters of green trees covering the rolling hills to the left
expansive green prairie with gentle slopes stretching toward the mountains
white fluffy clouds scattered across the bright blue sky

segments.scene_description: A static third-person view captures a character sitting on a rocky outcrop overlooking a vast sunlit grassland valley. The scene features distant mountains under a clear blue sky with scattered clouds, while pine forests dot the left hillside. Birds occasionally fly across the sky, and the character briefly shifts position near the end of the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady third-person perspective of a character perched on a rocky outcrop overlooking a vast, sunlit grassland valley. It begins with a wide view of the expansive landscape, where distant mountains stand under a clear blue sky dotted with scattered clouds. As the camera lingers, the eye is drawn to the pine forests clinging to the left hillside while birds drift lazily across the open air. The scene remains tranquil and still before concluding with a subtle shift in the character's position as they adjust their seat on the stone.
